input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #8367 [Automation] native-image run fails for com.sksamuel.hoplite:hoplite-core:3.0.0.RC1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: If generated tests choose documentation examples using YAML, JSON, TOML, or HOCON files, those formats require optional modules such as hoplite-yaml or hoplite-json; core-only tests should instead use MapPropertySource or built-in .properties/.props parsing unless the workflow intentionally adds a format module.
Hoplite 3.0 changes environment-variable binding rules, so tests that cover environment variables should avoid depending on ambient CI environment values.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra setup is needed. The resolved hoplite-core 3.0.0.RC1 artifact depends only on Kotlin stdlib/reflect and kotlinx-coroutines, and its core API has built-in Map, system-property, environment-variable, command-line, input-stream, and .properties sources. Documentation says YAML/JSON/TOML/HOCON require separate optional Hoplite modules, but meaningful core coverage is reachable without those modules.
